# SCORE Target Market Data Worksheet

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, template-or-tool

## Resource purpose
Worksheet for collecting and organizing target market data.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when a user needs market research structure.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage

## Route the user here when
The user needs to define customer segment, market size, demand, or local market assumptions.

## BOSS routing notes
